articles.title: Community Payback Workers Maintain Graves at Whitworth Cemetery
articles.excerpt: A team of community payback workers has been seen mowing and strimming around graves at Whitworth Road Cemetery, demonstrating respect for the site while maintaining its appearance.
articles.content_html:
A team of community payback workers has been observed mowing and strimming around graves at Whitworth Road Cemetery. The workers were noted for their respectful approach to the headstones as they carried out their duties.

The maintenance work was witnessed by a member of the public who visited the cemetery to clean and strim two graves. They expressed appreciation for the efforts of the community payback team, highlighting the quality of their work.

Whitworth Road Cemetery serves as a resting place for many local families, and the upkeep of the site is important for the community. The involvement of community payback workers contributes positively to the cemetery's maintenance.

Such initiatives not only enhance the appearance of the cemetery but also provide valuable work experience for those involved in the community payback programme.
articles.legal_disclaimer: This article was compiled from identified public sources and may be updated when further verified information becomes available.

articles.title: Jewellery and antiques roadshow coming to Whitworth
articles.excerpt: A jewellery and antiques roadshow will visit The Ashcroft in Whitworth on Wednesday 15 July, offering same-day cash for unwanted valuables.
articles.summary: We Buy Vintage will hold a roadshow at The Ashcroft on Market Street, Whitworth, from 10am until 3pm on Wednesday 15 July 2026.
articles.content_html:
A jewellery and antiques roadshow will visit Whitworth on Wednesday 15 July 2026.

We Buy Vintage will hold the event at The Ashcroft, Market Street, Whitworth, OL12 8DP, from 10am until 3pm.

Residents are invited to bring unwanted valuables, jewellery and antiques to the roadshow, where the company says items can be converted into same-day cash.

Event details

  • Date: Wednesday 15 July 2026
  • Time: 10am to 3pm
  • Location: The Ashcroft, Market Street, Whitworth, OL12 8DP
  • Organiser: We Buy Vintage

Anyone seeking further information can call 0800 669 6010 or visit the We Buy Vintage website.

Visitors should satisfy themselves that they understand any valuation or sale terms before agreeing to sell an item.
articles.image_alt: Poster for the We Buy Vintage jewellery and antiques roadshow in Whitworth
articles.image_caption: The roadshow will be held at The Ashcroft in Whitworth on Wednesday 15 July.
articles.event_location: The Ashcroft, Market Street, Whitworth, OL12 8DP
